approach: make the universal-plugin CLI conform to AXI (Agent Experience Interface, github.com/kunchenguid/axi) design principles across build/validate/init/governance: TOON default output, minimal 3-4 field schemas, truncation + --full, pre-computed aggregates, definitive empty states, structured errors/no-prompts/fail-loud, content-first no-arg, next-step suggestions, per-subcommand help

scope: AXI #1-6 + #8-10 only. #7 (session-hook setup command + installable Agent Skill) DEFERRED to a follow-up CR -- collides with the charter boundary (lifecycle-hook ops -> cyberplace, agent-facing skills -> cyberspace/aced)

freeze handling: re-open & rewrite frozen scenarios in place (nothing shipped for validate/init; build+governance are implemented). User ratifies the re-open in-session as conductor. High blast radius (all 4 behavioral nodes) -> auto-spec: self-assert the spec gate within leash after cold judge PASS; narrowing hard-floor Clearance pre-authorized by the user's live re-open ratification; Conflict/Compatibility still stop.

why: AXI (Agent Experience Interface) output-contract adoption across all four universal-plugin commands: new axi/ reference node states the shared contract once (TOON default output, minimal 3-4 field schemas, truncation + --full, pre-computed aggregates, definitive empty states, structured/fail-loud errors, no interactive prompts, content-first group commands, next-step suggestions, per-subcommand help); the four behavioral .feature (build/validate/init/governance) re-opened from frozen and rewritten to assert the contract concretely, then re-frozen. Scope AXI #1-6 + #8-10; #7 (session-hook setup + installable skill) deferred to a follow-up CR (charter boundary -> cyberplace/cyberspace/aced; ADR-0003). cold sdd-spec-judge 3-lens all PASS ALIGNED true: round 1 Builder FAIL on two coverage gaps (managed scope never positively exercised; #6 no-prompts claimed but untested on build/validate/governance) -> both fixed (managed-wins scenario + uniform non-interactive scenarios + validate README claim) -> re-graded PASS. check-suite / check-spec-state / check-spec-structure(0/0) clean, 0 open markers, concept-index no drift (concept:axi now spans all 5 nodes). content-first #8 satisfied at group level (governance->list, plugin->validate) with no new command. re-open ratified by user in-session (Clearance floor pre-authorized).
